task_completion.description: Verify that the 'spray' variable levels have been modified so that 'F' is the first (reference) level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Data tab or variable setup window for 'spray', the list of levels shows 'F' at the very top.

task_completion.description: Verify that the general ANOVA module is used with the correct variables assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the ANOVA setup panel, 'count' is placed in the 'Dependent Variable' box and 'spray' is placed in the 'Fixed Factors' box.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Simple' contrasts are selected for the 'spray' factor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Contrasts' dropdown/section of the ANOVA setup panel, the contrast type next to 'spray' is set to 'Simple'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Simple Contrasts results table is generated and visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi results pane displays a 'Simple Contrasts - spray' table, showing comparisons including 'C' (or 'C - F') and its corresponding t-statistic.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Jamovi project is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi window title bar shows 'Spray_Contrasts.omv', or a file manager/terminal shows the file 'Spray_Contrasts.omv' in the ~/Documents/Jamovi/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that the text file containing the t-statistic is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output shows the file 'contrast_report.txt' in ~/Documents/Jamovi/ containing ONLY a numeric value (the t-statistic).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Jamovi interface (menus, variable assignment, contrast selection) rather than running R/Python scripts in a terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the results shown in Jamovi are genuinely generated by the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results pane should display standard Jamovi formatted tables, not manually typed text or edited HTML.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent extracted the t-statistic from the actual analysis rather than guessing or hardcoding.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric value written to 'contrast_report.txt' should match the t-statistic visible in the Jamovi Simple Contrasts results table.
